name: Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes
description: The product receives input that specifies multiple object attributes for initialization or update but does not properly restrict which attributes can be modified, allowing attackers to alter internal-only fields like roles, permissions, or pricing through mass assignment.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides key-value pairs or structured data that flows to a TRANSFORM[object_binding] node (mass assignment, autobinding, Object.assign, spread operator) which sets object properties in STORAGE without a CONTROL node that allowlists permitted attributes or blocklists sensitive ones
